sources: Official immigration portals (Spain UGE, Portugal AIMA, Thailand MFA)
metadata.note: Real-world processing times are estimated based on crowd-sourced approvals from the last 30 days.

visas.income_calculation_basis: 200% of the Spanish Minimum Wage (SMI) for the main applicant
top_rejection_reasons: Incorrect formatting of the contract or employer letter (must specify remote work permission and duration).
Missing social security certificate (CoC) or proof of private social security payments.
Wrong translation or lack of apostille on criminal record certificates.

latest_consulate_reports.london_uk: Currently taking 35-45 days. Strict check on company existence.
latest_consulate_reports.washington_us: Taking 20-30 days. Requires physical drop-off of documents.
latest_consulate_reports.local_application_spain: Submitted online via UGE: averaging 25 days. Highest success rate.

required_documents_summary: Valid passport (minimum 1 year validity)
Proof of work relation (contract > 3 months old)
Company certificate showing at least 1 year of active business
Letter from employer authorizing remote work from Spain
Criminal record certificate from countries of residence in last 5 years (apostilled and translated)
Proof of sufficient income (bank statements + payslips for last 3 months)
Spanish private health insurance (no co-payments)

visas.visa_name: Digital Nomad Visa / D8 (Temporary Stay & Residency)
top_rejection_reasons: Lack of 12-month lease agreement (term of lease must be registered with Portuguese Tax Authority Finanças).
Insufficient savings in a Portuguese bank account (minimum 1-year income backup recommended).
Freelancers failing to show stable recurring contract flows.

latest_consulate_reports.san_francisco_us: Averaging 90 days. Strict on bank account residency details.
latest_consulate_reports.manchester_uk: Taking around 100 days. Require hard copies of all lease terms.

required_documents_summary: NIF (Portuguese tax number)
Portuguese bank account statement showing balance
12-month registered lease agreement (Contrato de Arrendamento)
Employment contract or freelance service agreements
Proof of average monthly income for the last 3 months >= €3,280
Travel insurance with medical coverage (minimum €30,000)
Criminal background check (apostilled/legalized)

visas.income_calculation_basis: No monthly income requirement. Requires proof of savings/funds of at least 500,000 THB (~$13,800 USD)
top_rejection_reasons: Submitting proof of funds from a crypto wallet or unstable asset (must be a traditional bank statement in fiat currency).
Insufficient proof of remote work (freelancers must show portfolio/clients; employees need clear employer letter).
Applying from a country where you do not hold residency or a valid tourist entry stamp.

latest_consulate_reports.vientiane_laos: E-visa process taking 5-7 working days. Highly popular, very high approval rate.
latest_consulate_reports.penang_malaysia: Taking 4-6 days. Strict on financial verification.
latest_consulate_reports.london_uk: E-visa taking 10 days. Requires detailed tax documents from remote company.

required_documents_summary: Passport with at least 6 months validity
Bank statement showing at least 500,000 THB (~€13,000 / $13,800)
Employment contract or business license showing remote worker/freelancer status
Portfolio or proof of active projects (for freelancers)
If applying under 'cultural/soft power' category (Muay Thai, cooking course, medical): proof of enrollment/booking

visas.income_calculation_basis: 3x minimum wage required for exemption from healthcare contribution (~€28,000/year)
top_rejection_reasons: Lack of highly specialized work credentials (requires university degree or 5 years of documented experience).
Health insurance policies lacking specific coverage terms required by Italian law.
Failing to provide a signed declaration of tax compliance in Italy.

latest_consulate_reports.new_york_us: Very strict on the university degree requirement. Averaging 45 days.
latest_consulate_reports.london_uk: Taking 60 days. Requires official translation of work contracts.

required_documents_summary: University Degree (minimum 3 years) OR proof of 5 years professional experience in the field
Employment contract or collaboration agreement for remote work
Declaration from employer confirming remote work setup
Proof of annual income >= €28,000
Proof of accommodation in Italy (lease or hospitality letter)
Comprehensive health insurance policy covering all risks (no limits)
